title: A Review on Genomics APIs.
author: Swaminathan R Huang Y Moosavinasab S Buckley R Bartlett CW Lin SM
content: S-EPMC4669666 PMC4669666 A Review on Genomics APIs. The constant improvement and falling prices of whole human genome Next Generation Sequencing (NGS) has resulted in rapid adoption of genomic information at both clinics and research institutions.
